name: @modlink-studio/plugin-scaffold
description: Interactive React + Ink scaffold generator for ModLink Python driver plugins

scripts.lint: biome check src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts vitest.config.ts biome.json
scripts.lint:fix: biome check --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts vitest.config.ts biome.json
scripts.format: biome format --write src tests package.json tsconfig.json tsup.config.ts vitest.config.ts biome.json
